parameters.content:
## 1 — Start here

**Manual Trigger** → run on demand
**Schedule Trigger** → every Monday 9 AM

Edit the **Config** node to set your video URL.
Leave topic and target at "auto" — adapts to any niche.

## 2 — Scrape + dedupe

**Scrape Comments** → every comment on the video
**Sort by Likes** → highest engagement first
**Dedupe by Username** → one row per person, best comment kept

## 3 — LLM ranking

**Build Cohere Request** → formats comments into a ranking prompt
**Rank with Cohere** → returns a top-15 prospect shortlist

## 4 — Enrich + export

**Enrich Profiles** → bio, followers, seller flag, bio link
**Join Prospects** → merges rankings + comments + profiles by username
**Export CSV** → download your prospect list
